title: Message Header
story: [Meridian-7 Log #016] Formal communication has begun. Every message must carry a standard header in [TYPE-CODE] format. TYPE is the message type (uppercase letters), CODE is the number (digits). Your first message must be correctly formatted, or rEx will not respond.
promptChallenge: Write a prompt to have AI generate a regex that matches message headers in [TYPE-CODE] format (e.g., [ERR-404], [MSG-001])
hints: [Hint] The message header is enclosed in square brackets
[Hint] TYPE is one or more uppercase letters
[Hint] CODE is one or more digits
promptHints: Describe the exact structure of the message header
Use a step-by-step approach: bracket → uppercase letters → hyphen → digits → bracket
Tell the AI that uppercase letters and digits each require at least one

feedback.onPass: [Pattern Accepted] Message header parsed. The communication protocol structure is emerging.
feedback.onFail: [Parse Failed] Message header format error. Structured description is key.
feedback.onPerfect: [Decryption Success] Protocol header parsed perfectly. The power of structured instructions.
feedback.onDirectWrite: [Manual Override] Manual protocol parsing. Message structure is crystal clear to you.
